groundTruthStatus: VALIDATED 2026-06-04 PO (szymonwal) — ground truth proposed by the agent from reading the codebase (anti-bias: NOT derived from embedder results), reviewed and approved by the product owner. Safe to freeze TASK-017 numbers.
notes: Queries are English to match the English embedder (Xenova/bge-small-en-v1.5); `concept` carries the PL label.
expectedFiles are repo-relative paths; a hit = any expected file appears in the top-k search results.
Coverage: web (5), mobile (4), wiki (3), tools (3) — all four segments incl. the tool itself.
